prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 北京工业大学在上海市仅2025年有综合类录取数据，最低位次约9550名，为近年唯一可参考基准位次；2025年上海综合类计划15人，2026年（§ 7）计划增至20人，扩招约33%，计划人数增加意味着竞争加剧，位次数字预计后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第65名，较2025年 （第72名）有所回升，整体处于中上211水平；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及师德师风事件（拟录取研究生不当言论被取消资格），可能轻微抑制报考热度；抖音热度总排名第57（较热），短视频曝光量中等偏上，对报考关注度有一定正向拉动。未发现明显投档断档记录；拥有5个A-及以上学科：环境科学与工程 （A）、光学工程（A-）、土木工程（A-）、材料科学与工程（A-）、软件工程（A-），学科实力在211高校中较为突出，对相关工科专业报考有吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业持续高热推荐，与该校工科特色高度契合；上海市2026年考生总数约66700人（较2025年49276人增长约35%），考生规模大幅增加，竞 争显著加剧；北京工业大学位于北京，对上海考生属于跨省报考；该校在沪招生占比较小（2025年仅15人），属外省招生 规模较小的院校，地域偏好对报考热度影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年扩招33%、上海考生增加约35%、学校声誉偏负面、抖音热度较热等多重因素：扩招使位次数字增大 ，但考生增幅更大进一步加剧竞争，两者叠加推动位次后移；声誉偏负面有轻微抑制作用。预测2026年最低位次约11500名，区间11000–12000名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 计算机科学与技术（实验班）
- 微电子科学与工程（实验班）
- 机器人工程。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 网络空间安全
- 光电信息科学与工程。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 机械类（含机械工程、智能制造工程、增材制造工程）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间11000–12000名内，建议以二档专业（网络空间安全、光电信息科学与工程）为主攻方向，一档专业（计算机、微电子、机器人）作为冲刺，三档机械类作为保底 。位次明显优于区间下限（如11000名以内）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: Beijing University of Technology only has comprehensive admission data for 2025 in Shanghai, with the lowest ranking around 9550, which is the only reference benchmark in recent years; the 2025 Shanghai comprehensive enrollment plan is 15 students, and the 2026 (§ 7) plan increases to 20 students, an expansion of about 33%. The increase in planned enrollment means intensified competition, and the ranking number is expected to move backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking is approximately 65th, up from 72nd in 2025, maintaining an upper-middle 211 level; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving teacher ethics incidents (an admitted graduate student's inappropriate remarks led to disqualification), which may slightly suppress application enthusiasm; Douyin heat ranking is 57th overall (relatively hot), with medium-high short video exposure, positively influencing application attention to some extent. No obvious enrollment gaps or breaks were found; it has 5 A- or higher disciplines: Environmental Science and Engineering (A), Optical Engineering (A-), Civil Engineering (A-), Materials Science and Engineering (A-), Software Engineering (A-), with strong disciplinary strength among 211 universities, attracting applications for related engineering majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science, electronic information/communication, electrical engineering, and other majors continue to be highly recommended, closely matching the university's engineering characteristics; the total number of Shanghai candidates in 2026 is about 66,700 (an increase of about 35% from 49,276 in 2025), significantly increasing competition; Beijing University of Technology is located in Beijing, which is an inter-provincial application for Shanghai candidates; the university's enrollment share in Shanghai is small (only 15 in 2025), making it a small-scale inter-provincial enrollment institution, with regional preference having limited impact on application enthusiasm.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 33% enrollment expansion in 2026, the approximately 35% increase in Shanghai candidates, the somewhat negative reputation, and the relatively hot Douyin heat: the expansion increases the ranking number, but the larger increase in candidates further intensifies competition, both pushing the ranking backward; the somewhat negative reputation has a slight suppressing effect. The predicted lowest ranking for 2026 is about 11,500, with a range of 11,000–12,000.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Computer Science and Technology (Experimental Class)
- Microelectronics Science and Engineering (Experimental Class)
- Robotics Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Cyberspace Security
- Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Mechanical Engineering (including Mechanical Engineering, Intelligent Manufacturing Engineering, Additive Manufacturing Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 11,000–12,000, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Cyberspace Security, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Computer Science, Microelectronics, Robotics) as a sprint, and Tier 3 Mechanical Engineering as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 11,000), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors.
